foreground_lanes.purpose: repo fingerprint, changed files, and syntax-safe checks
mapper -> prompt -> dev-cli -> sprint -> runtime contract chain
runtime CLI functional checks that do not fight Cargo target locks
browser evidence when the selected task touches frontend behavior

failure_classification.name: environment
failure_classification.description: host, shell, timeout, path, permission, or OS condition

failure_classification.name: dependency
failure_classification.description: missing or incompatible package, toolchain, browser, or adapter

failure_classification.name: test_failure
failure_classification.description: assertion or expected behavior failure in targeted tests

failure_classification.name: product_bug
failure_classification.description: reproducible defect caused by runtime or application logic

failure_classification.name: flaky
failure_classification.description: non-deterministic timing, network, or browser failure

failure_classification.name: missing_config
failure_classification.description: endpoint, browser, contract, model, or policy config is absent

details.escalation_policy: environment and flaky checks may retry once; product bugs stop widening and require implementation review
